title: althaea × pavisii
intro: Althaea × pavisii, also known as Marsh Mallow hybrid, is a rare, sterile hybrid plant between the Marsh Mallow (Althaea officinalis) and the Mediterranean Mallow (Althaea pavisii). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, soothing, and protective effects on mucous membranes. The health benefits of Althaea × pavisii include relief from digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Althaea × pavisii can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or syrup to utilize its medicinal properties, similar to its parent species, Marsh Mallow.
